name: @waves/report-redaction
description: Single source of truth for project-report internal-fee redaction: the INTERNAL_FINDING_KEYS registry and the inspection-fee cue scrubber. Imported by BOTH the server egress/write guards (project-types.js) and the client report surfaces (wdoReportFields.js) so the customer page, the admin preview, and the server payload cannot drift. Pure CommonJS, no dependencies.
